name: Damped harmonic oscillator
task: Create /tmp/eval_dho/dho.py with damped_position(x0, v0, omega0, gamma, t) returning the displacement at time t of a damped harmonic oscillator obeying x'' + 2γ x' + ω₀² x = 0. Inputs are guaranteed underdamped (gamma < omega0); gamma == 0 is the undamped case and must also be handled. Use the closed-form solution x(t) = exp(-γt) [A cos(ω_d t) + B sin(ω_d t)] with ω_d = sqrt(ω₀² - γ²), A = x₀, B = (v₀ + γ x₀) / ω_d.

validation.script: import importlib.util,math; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_dho/dho.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); D = mod.damped_position; assert abs(D(1.0,0.0,5.0,0.5,0)-1.0) < 1e-9; assert abs(D(1.0,0.0,5.0,0.5,100)) < 1e-6; assert abs(D(1.0,0.0,1.0,0.0,math.pi)+1.0) < 1e-9; assert abs(D(0.0,1.0,2.0,0.0,math.pi/4)-0.5) < 1e-9; print('OK')
